title: Automation - When user is registered in monday.com account we need notification that user registered successfully and get his/her info

posts.author: Aniket_Katre3 (Aniket)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi team,

Automation - When user is registered in monday.com account we need notification that user registered successfully and get his/her info.

I wanted to set up automated process for managing users. Whenever a new user is added in monday.com, automatically notification should be sent to particular members with monday.com user id & email id. Is there any API or automations available for the same? Can we use webhooks to get new user notifications?
Thanks,
Aniket
